author: dashboard-bootstrap
content: PASS 2 complete. Mode seam: HubMode{V2,V3} (hub_v3.rs ~620), HubMode::resolve(cache_dir) called once in SyncManager::new (sync/core.rs); SharedWriter reads via sync.hub_mode(). V3 prepare skips counter claims: claim_display_id/claim_milestone_id early-return (0, Counters::default()) when is_v3 (no counters.json read); normalize_events_for_v3 strips display_id->None on IssueCreated/CommentAdded/TimeEntryAdded/MilestoneCreated (shared_writer/core.rs). write_commit_push + emit_compact_push branch to commit_v3 (append_event_to_ref own ref -> push_agent_ref FF -> fetch+adopt others lock-free -> reduce/cache state -> write+push checkpoint, NO prune). read_max_event_seq mode-aware: V3 reads max agent_seq from own ref via hub_v3::read_max_event_seq_from_ref. lock_check v3: read_locks_auto->read_locks_v3 reads LOCAL checkpoint ref state.json directly (no full reduce); staleness window = last local compaction (== v2 read_locks_auto reads last-compact materialized files). Fetch adoption: other agents' refs adopted unconditionally to remote tip (writer-authoritative, FF or post-prune non-FF); own ref never moved from remote; checkpoint adopted when remote watermark>=local; fetch refreshes local checkpoint but does NOT prune (prune confined to compact cmd which force-syncs own ref after prune). hydrate_from_state(state,&db) reuses db.insert_hydrated_* helpers, single txn, FK-off, empty-state data-loss guard, #443 SQLite-only preservation. Heartbeats/requests/acks routed to hub_v3 primitives when V3. Entry points mode-routed: sync_cmd, daemon tick, compact cmd. Idempotency guard added to compact_v3 (skip checkpoint commit when state.json byte-identical) to keep migrate re-run a no-op. Direct-reader sites for PASS 3 (unchanged, routed via read_locks_auto/read_heartbeats_auto which are now mode-aware so they work, but these read state directly): server/watcher.rs:114,164; dashboard/reader.rs:151-164,309,355,366 (reads issue files/locks.json/heartbeats DIRECTLY - NOT via read_*_auto, needs v3 rework); tui/agents_tab.rs:177,182,867,876; tui/config_tab.rs:1125,1131; server/handlers/agents.rs:201,205,260,266,386,440; server/handlers/sync.rs:44; commands/next.rs:32; commands/agent.rs:748; commands/locks_cmd.rs list/check; integrity hubv3 unchanged. Tests: lib 1996(+3 hydrate_from_state), bin 3001(+11 v3 e2e), cli 194. Gates: fmt clean, both clippy clean.
